full_prompt: Design a NAVAIR external-store suspension lug for a generic 500-lb class external store carried on a tactical aircraft, using MIL-HDBK-5J / MMPDS A-basis material allowables per NAVAIR 01-1A-1 manual guidance, and MIL-A-8591 suspension lug specification. Envelope: 120 x 60 x 80 mm. Interfaces: 14 MK 80-series standard suspension hook bore 12.7 mm (0.500 inch) +0.05/-0.00, with a minimum bearing length of 20 mm; mounting footprint bolts four NAS-1351 5/16 inch bolts on 50 x 50 mm square pattern. Material: AISI 4340 steel per AMS 6415 (L-direction A-basis yield 1,034 MPa = 150 ksi, A-basis UTS 1,241 MPa = 180 ksi, Young's modulus 205 GPa, density 7850 kg/m^3, minimum elongation 12%) heat treated to 180 ksi UTS and cadmium plated per AMS-QQ-P-416. Load cases per MIL-A-8591H: LC1 limit load 3 x store weight vertical = 3 x 500 lbf = 1,500 lbf (6.67 kN) during 3 g maneuver; LC2 ultimate 1.5 x limit = 2,250 lbf (10.0 kN); LC3 ejection load at store release 30 g vertical = 15,000 lbf (66.7 kN) for 10 ms; LC4 buffet/fatigue spectrum 10^6 cycles at varying store weight 0.5x to 1.5x static in 1 Hz bandwidth; LC5 yaw maneuver side load 2 g lateral = 1,000 lbf (4.45 kN). Pass/fail per MIL-HDBK-5J + MIL-A-8591H: (R1) max von Mises at limit LC1 <= A-basis yield = 1,034 MPa (no permanent deformation at limit); (R2) max von Mises at ultimate LC2 <= A-basis UTS = 1,241 MPa (no rupture at ultimate, SF 1.5 on UTS); (R3) lug bearing stress at the 14 MK 80 hook hole <= F_bru / 1.5 = A-basis bearing ultimate 1,724 MPa (250 ksi per MMPDS for 4340 at 180 ksi UTS with e/D=2) / 1.5 = 1,149 MPa; (R4) ejection transient LC3 peak stress <= UTS 1,241 MPa; (R5) fatigue life >= 10^6 cycles at buffet spectrum using 4340 S-N curve per MIL-HDBK-5J (endurance limit approx 0.5 x UTS = 620 MPa at 10^7, derated for Kt 2.5 + mean stress); (R6) cadmium plating thickness 7.5-15 um per AMS-QQ-P-416 Type II; (R7) hook-bore tolerance +0.05/-0.00 and surface finish Ra <= 0.8 um. Deliverables: STEP AP242; FEA static + transient ejection + fatigue; MIL-HDBK-5J allowables cited explicitly in the compliance matrix.
short_prompt:
Design a NAVAIR external-store suspension lug for a generic 500-lb class external store on a tactical aircraft, using MIL-HDBK-5J / MMPDS A-basis allowables per NAVAIR 01-1A-1 and MIL-A-8591 suspension-lug specification.

Envelope: 120 x 60 x 80 mm. Interfaces: 14 MK 80-series standard suspension hook bore 12.7 mm (0.500 inch) +0.05/-0.00 with minimum bearing length 20 mm; mounting footprint with four NAS-1351 5/16 inch bolts on 50 x 50 mm.

Material: AISI 4340 per AMS 6415 heat-treated to 180 ksi UTS, cadmium plated per AMS-QQ-P-416 Type II (7.5-15 um). Surface finish at hook bore Ra <= 0.8 um.

Load cases per MIL-A-8591H.
- LC1 limit 3 x store weight vertical: 3 x 500 lbf = 1,500 lbf (6.67 kN).
- LC2 ultimate 1.5 x limit: 2,250 lbf (10.0 kN).
- LC3 ejection at store release: 30 g vertical = 15,000 lbf (66.7 kN) for 10 ms.
- LC4 buffet/fatigue 10^6 cycles at 0.5x-1.5x static store weight in 1 Hz bandwidth.
- LC5 yaw maneuver side: 2 g lateral = 1,000 lbf (4.45 kN).

Bearing allowable at the 14 MK 80 hook hole: F_bru / 1.5 = 1,149 MPa (MMPDS 4340, 250 ksi bearing at e/D = 2, SF 1.5). Fatigue per MIL-HDBK-5J (endurance ~0.5 x UTS = 620 MPa at 10^7, derated for Kt 2.5 + mean stress).

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: MIL-HDBK-5J / MMPDS tables are reference tables, not simulation.
Kt, Kf, mean-stress corrections per Goodman/Gerber are closed-form.

prompt.title: AISI 4340 180 ksi external-store suspension lug per MIL-A-8591H + MIL-HDBK-5J
prompt.brief: Design a 120x60x80 mm 4340 forged/machined lug for 500-lb class store, 14 MK 80 hook, pass limit/ultimate/ejection/fatigue per MIL-HDBK-5J A-basis allowables.

material.name: AISI 4340 per AMS 6415, HT to 180 ksi UTS

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: A-basis yield per MIL-HDBK-5J AISI 4340 180 ksi
MIL-HDBK-5J 4340 S-N with Kt 2.5 and mean stress correction

requirements.governing_standard: MIL-HDBK-5J / MMPDS + MIL-A-8591H + NAVAIR 01-1A-1 + AMS 6415 + AMS-QQ-P-416

analysis_types: linear static limit + ultimate + transient ejection + fatigue S-N

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Buffet handled as fatigue spectrum, not modal.
exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Ambient / store temp range within 4340 working envelope.

notes.numeric_source: MIL-HDBK-5J Table 2.3.1 for 4340 180 ksi UTS A-basis allowables; MIL-A-8591H load factors for external stores.

eval_coverage: bearing stress check with e/D derivation
